name: Can I sue my employer for back injury instead of comp in Ogden?
description: No, comp exclusive unless intentional act.

mainEntity.name: Can I sue my employer for back injury instead of comp in Ogden?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, comp exclusive unless intentional act.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**No, workers' comp is exclusive remedy unless gross negligence or third party.**

Utah bars suits for negligence; intentional only.[2 similar]

- Third party fault: yes sue.
- Employer intent: rare exception.
- Comp limits but no-fault.

Stick to comp; attorney pursues extras.[1]
